title: Mod/Plugin Belo
description: Official Mondrith server plugin: Auto Smelt, Corrupted Piglins (100 levels), Invisible Commands, Unbreakable tools, Spy Inventory and full Vanish system.
body:
# MondrithPlugin

Official plugin for the Mondrith server. Requires Paper 1.19+ or 26.1.x.

## Features

### ⚒️ Auto Smelt — `/autosmelt <player|@a>`
Automatically smelts ores and animal drops. Breaking an ore gives you the ingot directly. Killing an animal gives cooked food. Compatible with Fortune and Silk Touch. Does not work in Creative mode.

### 👹 Corrupted Piglins — `/piglincorrotti <0-100> <player|@a>`
Enhances Piglin bartering across 100 levels. Level 0 is vanilla bartering. Higher levels give increasingly powerful loot, up to a full Netherite set, enchanted golden apples, totems, elytra and more at level 100 (God Mode).

### 👁️ Invisible Commands — `/comandiinvisibili <player|@a>`
Hides a player's commands from the server console and operators, even with sendCommandFeedback enabled. Activates automatically when using /spariscidalgioco.

### 🛡️ Unbreakable — `/indistruttibile <player|@a>`
Makes all tools, weapons and armor in a player's inventory unbreakable. The tag is hidden from the tooltip and applies automatically to newly picked up items.

### 🔍 Spy Inventory — `/spiainventario <player>`
Opens a 54-slot GUI showing a player's full inventory, including armor, hotbar and offhand. Click items to take them — they are removed from the target's real inventory. Works on offline players too (shows their last saved snapshot).

### 👻 Vanish — `/spariscidalgioco [player]`
Complete vanish system. Broadcasts a fake "left the game" message when activated and "joined the game" when deactivated.

- Invisible to all players
- Hidden from the TAB list and server list player count
- Mobs cannot see or target you
- No damage from any source
- Creative-style flight always enabled
- No collision with other players
- Chat messages hidden from non-admins
- Commands hidden automatically
- Respawn while still vanished
- Death messages suppressed

## Compatibility
- ✅ Paper / Spigot 1.19.x → 1.21.x and 26.1.x
- ❌ Forge or Fabric servers not supported

## Permissions
All commands require operator level or the following permissions:
`mondrith.autosmelt` · `mondrith.piglincorrotti` · `mondrith.comandiinvisibili` · `mondrith.indistruttibile` · `mondrith.spiainventario` · `mondrith.sparisci` · `mondrith.*` (all)
